pi_items.metadata_value: Real Yahoo Finance AAPL daily data
pi_items.verified_value: Yahoo Finance provides AAPL historical daily data (OHLCV) for 2023-2024
pi_items.source: env.json states data comes from Yahoo Finance; Yahoo Finance AAPL data available at https://finance.yahoo.com/quote/AAPL/history/
Web search results from https://sortter.com/blog/article/how-many-trading-days-in-a-year/ and https://www.macroption.com/trading-days-per-year/ confirm 252 trading days in 2023 and 251 in 2024

privileged_info_summary: The task requires creating a NinjaTrader 8 chart template named 'SwingTrading' for AAPL with real Yahoo Finance daily data from 2023-2024 containing four technical indicators: EMA(9), EMA(21), RSI(14), and MACD(12,26,9). All specified indicator parameters are industry-standard values widely used in technical analysis. The template directory location matches NinjaTrader 8's standard path (C:\Users\Docker\Documents\NinjaTrader 8\templates\Chart). The dataset contains approximately 503 trading days (252 in 2023 + 251 in 2024), though the README claims 502 days.
